chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 166 of 2014 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________  For hearing of main case 24.09.2025 Mr. Aamir Raza, advocate holds brief for Mr. Ameer-uddin, advocate for the applicant Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent This reference application is pending since 2014. Applicant has either been unrepresented or adjournment is being sought on behalf of the applicant’s counsel since 2015. Even today, a brief is held and adjournment is sought for no cogent reason. In view of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
